title: digitaria tomentosa
intro: Digitaria tomentosa is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly known as finger grass. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria tomentosa include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Digitaria tomentosa include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments.
